name: GH_Capsule
summary: Class used to draw standard Grasshopper interface boxes.

methods.name: AddInputGrip(Point)
methods.signature: public void AddInputGrip(Point P)
methods.summary: Add an input grip to this UI Box.

params.name: P
params.doc: Coordinate of grip.

methods.name: AddInputGrip(PointF)
methods.signature: public void AddInputGrip(PointF P)
methods.summary: Add an input grip to this UI Box.

params.name: P
params.doc: Coordinate of grip.

methods.name: AddInputGrip(Single)
methods.signature: public void AddInputGrip(float Y)
methods.summary: Add an input grip to this UI Box. This is the recommended overload.

params.name: Y
params.doc: Y coordinate of grip.

methods.name: AddInputGrip(Single, Single)
methods.signature: public void AddInputGrip(float X, float Y)
methods.summary: Add an input grip to this UI Box.

params.name: X
params.doc: X coordinate of grip.

params.name: Y
params.doc: Y coordinate of grip.

methods.name: AddOutputGrip(Point)
methods.signature: public void AddOutputGrip(Point P)
methods.summary: Add an output grip to this UI Box.

params.name: P
params.doc: Coordinate of grip.

methods.name: AddOutputGrip(PointF)
methods.signature: public void AddOutputGrip(PointF P)
methods.summary: Add an output grip to this UI Box.

params.name: P
params.doc: Coordinate of grip.

methods.name: AddOutputGrip(Single)
methods.signature: public void AddOutputGrip(float Y)
methods.summary: Add an output grip to this UI Box. This is the recommended overload.

params.name: Y
params.doc: Y coordinate of grip.

methods.name: AddOutputGrip(Single, Single)
methods.signature: public void AddOutputGrip(float X, float Y)
methods.summary: Add an output grip to this UI Box.

params.name: X
params.doc: X coordinate of grip.

params.name: Y
params.doc: Y coordinate of grip.

methods.name: Contains
methods.signature: public bool Contains(PointF pt)
methods.summary: Test a point for capsule containment.

params.name: pt
params.doc: Point to test.

returns.doc: True if the point is on the interior of the capsule.

methods.name: CreateCapsule(Rectangle, GH_Palette)
methods.signature: public static GH_Capsule CreateCapsule(Rectangle box, GH_Palette palette)
methods.summary: Create a new blank capsule with default radius and highlight dimensions.

params.name: box
params.doc: Box for capsule dimensions. The box will be grown until it is at least 3 pixels wide and high.

params.name: palette
params.doc: Colour palette to apply.

returns.doc: A new instance of GH_Capsule. Caller is responsible for disposing of the object.

methods.name: CreateCapsule(RectangleF, GH_Palette)
methods.signature: public static GH_Capsule CreateCapsule(RectangleF box, GH_Palette palette)
methods.summary: Create a new blank capsule with default radius and highlight dimensions.

params.name: box
params.doc: Box for capsule dimensions. The box will be grown until it is at least 3 pixels wide and high.

params.name: palette
params.doc: Colour palette to apply.

returns.doc: A new instance of GH_Capsule. Caller is responsible for disposing of the object.

methods.name: CreateCapsule(Rectangle, GH_Palette, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static GH_Capsule CreateCapsule(Rectangle box, GH_Palette palette, int radius, int highlight)
methods.summary: Create a new blank capsule.

params.name: box
params.doc: Box for capsule dimensions. The box will be grown until it is at least 3 pixels wide and high.

params.name: palette
params.doc: Colour palette to apply.

params.name: radius
params.doc: Radius of rounded corners. A radius of zero or lower disables corner fillets.

params.name: highlight
params.doc: Height of the highlight bar. A value of zero or lower disables the highlight.

returns.doc: A new instance of GH_Capsule. Caller is responsible for disposing of the object.

methods.name: CreateCapsule(Rectangle, GH_Palette, Int32[], Int32)
methods.signature: public static GH_Capsule CreateCapsule(Rectangle box, GH_Palette palette, int[] radii, int highlight)
methods.summary: Create a new blank capsule.

params.name: box
params.doc: Box for capsule dimensions. The box will be grown until it is at least 3 pixels wide and high.

params.name: palette
params.doc: Colour palette to apply.

params.name: radii
params.doc: Radii of rounded corners. This array must contain at least 4 integers. Radii are defined clockwise, starting at the upper left corner.

params.name: highlight
params.doc: Height of the highlight bar. A value of zero or lower disables the highlight.

returns.doc: A new instance of GH_Capsule. Caller is responsible for disposing of the object.

methods.name: CreateCapsule(RectangleF, GH_Palette, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static GH_Capsule CreateCapsule(RectangleF box, GH_Palette palette, int radius, int highlight)
methods.summary: Create a new blank capsule.

params.name: box
params.doc: Box for capsule dimensions. The box will be grown until it is at least 3 pixels wide and high.

params.name: palette
params.doc: Colour palette to apply.

params.name: radius
params.doc: Radius of rounded corners. A radius of zero or lower disables corner fillets.

params.name: highlight
params.doc: Height of the highlight bar. A value of zero or lower disables the highlight.

returns.doc: A new instance of GH_Capsule. Caller is responsible for disposing of the object.

methods.name: CreateCapsule(RectangleF, GH_Palette, Int32[], Int32)
methods.signature: public static GH_Capsule CreateCapsule(RectangleF box, GH_Palette palette, int[] radii, int highlight)
methods.summary: Create a new blank capsule.

params.name: box
params.doc: Box for capsule dimensions. The box will be grown until it is at least 3 pixels wide and high.

params.name: palette
params.doc: Colour palette to apply.

params.name: radii
params.doc: Radii of rounded corners. This array must contain at least 4 integers. Radii are defined clockwise, starting at the upper left corner.

params.name: highlight
params.doc: Height of the highlight bar. A value of zero or lower disables the highlight.

returns.doc: A new instance of GH_Capsule. Caller is responsible for disposing of the object.

methods.name: CreateTextCapsule(Rectangle, Rectangle, GH_Palette, String)
methods.signature: public static GH_Capsule CreateTextCapsule(Rectangle box, Rectangle textbox, GH_Palette palette, string text)
methods.summary: Create a new capsule with content text.

params.name: box
params.doc: Box for capsule dimensions. The box will be grown until it is at least 3 pixels wide and high.

params.name: textbox
params.doc: Box into which the text will be drawn.

params.name: palette
params.doc: Colour palette to apply.

params.name: text
params.doc: Text to display inside the capsule.

returns.doc: A new instance of GH_Capsule. Caller is responsible for disposing of the object.

methods.signature: public static GH_Capsule CreateTextCapsule(RectangleF box, RectangleF textbox, GH_Palette palette, string text)

params.name: textbox

params.name: palette
params.doc: Colour palette to apply.

params.name: text
params.doc: Text to display inside the capsule.

returns.doc: A new instance of GH_Capsule. Caller is responsible for disposing of the object.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.signature: public void Dispose()
methods.summary: Releases all resources used by the GH_Capsule

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.signature: protected virtual void Dispose(bool disposing)
methods.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the GH_Capsule and optionally releases the managed resources

params.name: disposing
params.doc: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources

methods.name: Render(Graphics, GH_PaletteStyle)
methods.signature: public void Render(Graphics G, GH_PaletteStyle style)
methods.summary: Have this capsule draw itself onto a Graphics surface with a custom Style override.

params.name: G
params.doc: Graphics object to draw with. Zoom factor is implied by the G.Transform property.

params.name: style
params.doc: Style to draw capsule with.

methods.name: Render(Graphics, Color)
methods.signature: public void Render(Graphics G, Color colour)
methods.summary: Have this capsule draw itself onto a Graphics surface with a custom colour override.

params.name: G
params.doc: Graphics object to draw with. Zoom factor is implied by the G.Transform property.

params.name: colour
params.doc: Base colour for the capsule. Other colours will be derived from the base colour. If you want full control over every colour involved, then use the overload that allows you to supply a custom Style instead.

methods.name: Render(Graphics, Image, GH_PaletteStyle)
methods.signature: public void Render(Graphics G, Image icon, GH_PaletteStyle style)
methods.summary: Have this capsule draw itself onto a Graphics surface with a custom Style override.

params.name: G
params.doc: Graphics object to draw with. Zoom factor is implied by the G.Transform property.

params.name: icon
params.doc: Icon to render in center of content/bounding box.

params.name: style
params.doc: Style to draw capsule with.

methods.name: Render(Graphics, Image, Color)
methods.signature: public void Render(Graphics G, Image icon, Color colour)
methods.summary: Have this capsule draw itself onto a Graphics surface with a custom colour override.

params.name: G
params.doc: Graphics object to draw with. Zoom factor is implied by the G.Transform property.

params.name: icon
params.doc: Icon to render in center of content/bounding box.

params.name: colour
params.doc: Base colour for the capsule. Other colours will be derived from the base colour. If you want full control over every colour involved, then use the overload that allows you to supply a custom Style instead.

methods.name: Render(Graphics, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public void Render(Graphics G, bool selected, bool locked, bool hidden)
methods.summary: Render the capsule onto a graphics context.

params.name: G
params.doc: Graphics object to draw with. Zoom factor is implied by the G.Transform property.

params.name: selected
params.doc: If true, the capsule will be drawn with selected colours.

params.name: locked
params.doc: If True, the capcule will be drawn in Locked style.

params.name: hidden
params.doc: If True, the capsule will be drawn in Hidden style.

methods.name: Render(Graphics, Image, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public void Render(Graphics G, Image icon, bool selected, bool locked, bool hidden)
methods.summary: Render the capsule onto a graphics context.

params.name: G
params.doc: Graphics object to draw with. Zoom factor is implied by the G.Transform property.

params.name: icon
params.doc: Icon to render in center of content/bounding box.

params.name: selected
params.doc: If true, the capsule will be drawn with selected colours.

params.name: locked
params.doc: If True, the capcule will be drawn in Locked style.

params.name: hidden
params.doc: If True, the capsule will be drawn in Hidden style.

methods.name: SetJaggedEdges
methods.signature: public void SetJaggedEdges(bool left, bool right)
methods.summary: Assign left and right jagged edges.

properties.name: Box
properties.summary: Gets the outline box for this Capsule.

properties.name: Box_Content
properties.summary: Gets the content box for this Capsule. Text and icons are drawn inside this box.

properties.name: Font
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Font to use for text rendering.

properties.name: Highlight
properties.summary: Gets the highlight size for this Capsule. Zero or negative means there is no highlight.

properties.name: HighlightShape
properties.summary: Gets the graphics path that describes the highlight bar shape of the capsule.

properties.name: InputGrips
properties.summary: Gets the list of locally defined input grip locations.

properties.name: JaggedLeft
properties.summary: Gets whether the left edge of this capsule is jagged.

properties.name: JaggedRight
properties.summary: Gets whether the right edge of this capsule is jagged.

properties.name: MaxRadius
properties.summary: Gets the largest radius defined for this capsule.

properties.name: OutlineShape
properties.summary: Gets the graphics path that describes the outer edge of the capsule.

properties.name: OutputGrips
properties.summary: Gets the list of locally defined output grip locations.

properties.name: Palette
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette for this Capsule.

properties.name: Radius
properties.summary: Gets the radius of the rounded corners of this Capsule.

properties.name: RenderEngine
properties.summary: Gets the RenderEngine associated with this capsule. You typically don't need to go this far, just use one of the Render() overloads on GH_Capsule directly.
properties.remarks: Do not store pointers to the RenderEngine, always call this property anew.

properties.name: Text
properties.summary: Gets or sets the text to render in the content box.

properties.name: TextOrientation
properties.summary: Gets or sets the orientation of the text within the content box.

properties.name: DefaultHighlight
properties.summary: The default size (in pixel units) of the highlight bar.

properties.name: DefaultRadius
properties.summary: The default radius (in pixel units) of the rounded corners.
